title: couepia paraensis subsp. glaucescens
intro: Couepia paraensis subsp. glaucescens, also known as the Glaucescent Couepia, is a plant species belonging to the family Chrysobalanaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Couepia paraensis subsp. glaucescens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
